lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has minor scratches and some paint fading. The interior shows noticeable wear on the upholstery. Mechanical components are currently functional.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from regular use. All mechanical and electrical systems are in working order.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster with no stone chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the upholstery and trim show zero signs of wear, and it still carries that new-car feel. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a complete service history and every component performing exactly as designed. For the buyer seeking a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new, this is an exceptional example that requires no apologies.

Looking for an affordable and dependable vehicle? This car is in fair condition and ready to take on your daily adventures! While it shows some honest signs of use and wear, it has plenty of life left and offers fantastic value for anyone seeking a practical and reliable set of wheels. Come see why this solid performer is the perfect budget-friendly choice!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. The exterior retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear bumper consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound; it starts reliably, handles well, and all electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully functional. It has a complete service history and is ready for its next owner without needing immediate repairs.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and mechanical integrity. This unit has been maintained to a high standard, offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved aesthetic. Prospective owners will appreciate the seamless fusion of reliability and sophistication, making it a premier choice for those seeking quality without compromise.

Hey friends! I'm parting ways with my awesome ride, and she’s ready for a new home! It’s been such a reliable companion for me and is still in really solid shape. Everything runs smoothly, and it’s super comfortable for those long weekend drives. I’ve taken great care of it, so you’re getting a fantastic car that’s ready to hit the road right away. Can’t wait for someone else to enjoy it as much as I have!

Available is a driver-focused 997.1 Carrera powered by a 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six engine. This M96/05 unit delivers a crisp 325 hp through a 6-speed manual transaxle, ensuring optimal gear-spacing for spirited outings. The vehicle features Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and four-piston monobloc fixed calipers for superior stopping power and heat dissipation. It has undergone a proactive IMS bearing retrofit and a recent borescope inspection to confirm cylinder wall integrity. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response remain sharp.
Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth. Minor cosmetic wear.

This 2018 BMW 530i xDrive has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive mechanical and aesthetic shape. The Mediterranean Blue Metallic exterior retains a deep luster, with only minor, expected stone chips from highway commuting. Inside, the Canberra Beige Dakota leather interior is spotless, showing minimal bolster wear and no odors. All technological features, including the navigation system and heated seats, function perfectly. Under the hood, the 2.0L turbocharged engine delivers smooth power through the 8-speed automatic transmission, with a full service history documented at the local dealership. Tires have approximately 70% tread remaining, and the brakes were recently serviced. This is a reliable, premium sedan ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a comprehensive service history and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers consistent performance and a sophisticated road presence. Fully inspected to ensure mechanical integrity, it stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. This well-maintained unit represents a superior value proposition for those seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and prestige.

It’s been well-loved and still runs like a beauty. Come take it for a spin—I promise you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 represents a mechanically sound example of the iconic high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six delivers linear power with crisp throttle response, backed by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a functional limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been prioritized, including subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul to ensure timing stability. The suspension retains its factory-spec handling characteristics with refreshed bushings and tight dampers, providing excellent lateral grip and communicative steering feedback. While the exterior displays minor patina consistent with a well-driven enthusiast vehicle, the drivetrain and chassis integrity remain excellent, making this a turn-key performance machine for the discerning driver.
Clean title. Mechanically sound. Minimal cosmetic wear. Service records available. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear consistent with careful use and pride of ownership. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin where the premium upholstery and finishes have been preserved with exceptional care. Every feature, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in robust health; it has followed a rigorous service schedule, including a recent comprehensive inspection, oil change, and brake service. The engine delivers smooth, consistent power, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, offering a driving experience that feels tight and responsive. Equipped with tires that have plenty of tread remaining, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive professional assessment, confirming its mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. It represents an optimal acquisition for the discerning buyer who prioritizes reliability and sophisticated engineering in a pre-owned executive vehicle.
